title: FareTransferRule
description: A rule defining how fares from different legs are combined when a passenger makes a transfer between services.

fareProductId.description: Identifier of the fare product this transfer rule applies to

transferCount.description: Number of transfers permitted under this rule

durationLimit.description: Maximum duration in minutes for the transfer window

fareTransferType.description: Type of fare adjustment on transfer (e.g. FREE, DISCOUNT, ADDITIONAL_FARE)

validity.description: Validity window for this policy version
